games.headline: Texas Blank Cleveland, 10-0
games.summary: Jacob deGrom pitched 6.0 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 6 strikeouts, leading Texas past Cleveland 10-0 at Globe Life Field. Joey Cantillo lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 7 earned runs, 7 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Texas: W.Langford homered; J.Jung homered; J.Foscue homered with 2 RBI. Cleveland was held scoreless.

games.headline: St. Louis 5, Cincinnati 3 — Stanek (W)
games.summary: J.Walker delivered a crucial RBI single as part of a two-hit night, breaking a late-inning tie to guide the Cardinals past the Reds in a 5-3 victory at Busch Stadium. Ryne Stanek earned the win in relief while Riley O'Brien secured the final three outs for the save.

games.headline: Philadelphia 9, Chicago 5 — Alvarado (W)
games.summary: The teams combined for 14 runs, but T.Turner paced the offense with two hits as the Phillies downed the White Sox, 9-5, at Citizens Bank Park. J.Alvarado earned the victory out of the bullpen, shutting down a late threat to preserve the lead.

games.headline: New York 6, Boston 1 — Hill (W)
games.summary: C.Bellinger ignited the offense with a crucial home run and a pair of hits, driving the Yankees past the Red Sox for a 6-1 victory. His blast provided the spark the Yankees needed to break things open, backing a sharp pitching effort from winner T.Hill.

games.headline: Kansas City 6, Minnesota 5 — Cameron (W)
games.summary: S.Marte lined a clutch three-run homer and the Royals held off a late Twins rally to escape with a 6-5 victory at Target Field. N.Cameron earned the win with six scoreless innings, while L.Erceg shut the door in the ninth to preserve the narrow lead.

games.headline: Miami 4, Tampa Bay 1 — Alcantara (W)
games.summary: Sandy Alcantara pitched 7.0 innings, allowing 1 earned runs with 7 strikeouts, leading Miami past Tampa Bay 4-1 at loanDepot park. Garrett Cleavinger lasted 1.0 innings, giving up 2 earned runs, 2 strikeouts, 1 walks. Offensively for Miami: O.Lopez went 2-for-4, including 1 double, 1 triple with 1 RBI. Anthony Bender closed it out for the save.

games.headline: Los Angeles 13, Los Angeles 5
games.summary: S.Rivero went 5-for-5 with six RBIs to spark the Angels in a 13-5 blowout of the Dodgers at Dodger Stadium. J.Soriano earned the victory on the mound, holding the cross-town rivals to four runs over six innings.

games.headline: Athletics Blank Houston, 5-0
games.summary: Gage Jump pitched 6.1 innings, allowing 0 earned runs with 3 strikeouts, leading Athletics past Houston 5-0 at Daikin Park. Mike Burrows lasted 5.0 innings, giving up 4 earned runs, 3 strikeouts, 2 walks. Offensively for Athletics: N.Kurtz homered with 2 RBI; B.Rooker homered with 2 RBI; L.Butler went 2-for-4. Houston was held scoreless.

games.headline: San Francisco 2, Chicago 1 (F/10)
games.summary: M.Chapman broke a tense 1-1 tie in the tenth inning with an RBI single to lift the Giants past the Cubs 2-1 at Wrigley Field. After K.Winn kept the game tied in the ninth, D.Smith secured the final outs in the tenth to earn the save.

games.headline: Arizona 5, Washington 1 — Soroka (W)
games.summary: G.Moreno broke a scoreless tie with a key two-run home run to put the Diamondbacks ahead for good. M.Soroka then locked things down on the mound, striking out six over seven stellar innings in a 5-1 victory over the Nationals.
